item.name: Beetroot and Feta Salad
item.description: Suitable for vegetarians, made with fresh beetroot and feta salad.
item.alt: Beetroot and feta salad served in a bowl

item.name: Sourdough Rye Sandwich
item.description: Cheese and salad sandwich made with organic sourdough rye bread.
item.alt: Sourdough rye sandwich with fresh filling

item.name: Spinach Pie and Salad
item.alt: Spinach pie served with a side salad

item.name: Feta Pancakes with Salad
item.description: Tasty pancake filled with feta and salad.

item.name: Coffee - Small
item.description: For coffee, please inform the staff of the coffee type.
item.alt: Small coffee in a café cup

item.name: Coffee - Regular
item.description: For coffee, please inform the staff of the coffee type.
item.alt: Regular coffee in a café cup

item.name: Coffee - Large
item.description: For coffee, please inform the staff of the coffee type.
item.alt: Large coffee in a takeaway cup

item.name: Fresh Juice
item.alt: Fresh juice served in a glass
